turns.user: My favorite drink is masala chai.
turns.assistant: Got it, your favorite drink is masala chai.

turns.user: I usually work from home on Fridays.
turns.assistant: Understood, Fridays are your work-from-home days.

turns.user: Remind me to call mom on Sunday evening.
turns.assistant: Sure, I will remember your Sunday evening reminder.

turns.user: Our robot battery swap interval is every 6 hours.
turns.assistant: Noted, battery swap interval is 6 hours.

turns.user: I prefer concise answers unless I ask for detail.
turns.assistant: Okay, I will keep replies concise by default.

queries.query: When do I work from home?
What reminder did I set for Sunday?
How often should battery be swapped?
How should you answer by default?
